## Notice

Ordine is not accepting external pull requests until the beta release.

If this PR is from outside the maintainer team, it may be closed without review while the project is still in preview.

## Summary

Describe the change briefly.

## Validation

- [ ] `bun run check-types`
- [ ] `bun run test`
- [ ] `bun run build`

Add any rollout, migration, or follow-up context here.
